description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, clean white exterior walls, and large rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically. The front features a covered carport with two parking spaces, supported by wooden posts and a wooden slat roof. The property is landscaped with green grass, several mature trees, and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. At the rear, there is a rectangular swimming pool with a wooden deck and outdoor seating area, as well as a spacious patio. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, providing outdoor living spaces on both levels. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines, open spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with white walls, large windows, a carport, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and green landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport with two vehicles, and a large tree to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side windows, and the paved driveway extending toward the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and multiple balconies, with the house's geometric lines clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, wooden deck, and additional trees, with the carport partially visible on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single wooden door, covered by a flat-roofed carport supported by wooden posts, and a paved approach.
